About Me

Results-driven Full Stack Developer

Full Stack Developer with 2 production-deployed applications (Railway + Vercel) built using Java 17, Spring Boot 3, and React 19, with zero-touch CI/CD via GitHub Actions and Docker.

Engineered JWT-secured REST APIs, RBAC, Redux state pipelines, and Razorpay payment integration with HMAC SHA256 fraud prevention. Drove measurable quality improvements through structured QA tracking, schema optimization cutting API response times by ~20%, and process standardization that sharpened cross-functional delivery velocity.

Every project ships with a live URL, Postman collections, and a production-ready Docker configuration.

Work History

Experience

📅 Mar 2025 – Aug 2025
Java Full Stack Development Intern
KodNest Technologies Pvt. Ltd. · Bengaluru, KA
  • Architected a production-grade e-commerce REST API using Java 17, Spring Boot 3.2.5, Hibernate/JPA, and MySQL, exposing 25 endpoints across 6 controllers with layered MVC design (Controller → Service → Repository), delivering average API response payloads of ~1 KB per page.
  • Designed a normalized 5-table relational schema in MySQL using Advanced SQL (joins, foreign keys, indexing) and Spring Data JPA with @ManyToOne/@OneToMany relationships, implementing a 5-status order lifecycle and soft-delete pattern to preserve referential integrity.
  • Engineered a stateless JWT authentication system using Spring Security with BCrypt hashing and RBAC, securing 14 protected endpoints and applying the Filter Chain design pattern to reduce unauthorized access at the infrastructure layer.
  • Developed a React 19 SPA with Redux Toolkit (3 state slices), React Router v7, and localStorage-persistent sessions across 11 pages with role-gated routing — delivered as a solo full-stack project in 20 days across 38 Git commits.
  • Integrated Razorpay payment gateway with HMAC SHA256 server-side signature verification across UPI, card, and COD flows; containerized the Spring Boot backend via Docker multi-stage build and configured CI/CD on Railway and Vercel for automated deployments on every GitHub push.
Portfolio

Projects

Production-deployed applications with live URLs, CI/CD pipelines, and Postman-tested APIs.

README 38 Commits Docker · CI/CD ✅ Postman Tested
🛍️
Luxe Shop
Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
  • →Architected and deployed a production-grade e-commerce platform solo in 20 days — 25 REST API endpoints across 6 Spring Boot controllers with JWT auth, RBAC, and Razorpay payment integration verified end-to-end in test mode.
  • →Engineered a stateless JWT system using JJWT 0.11.5 with BCrypt hashing and @Valid validation — 14 protected endpoints, 7 public, zero authentication bypasses across 38 commits.
  • →Integrated Razorpay Java SDK with HMAC SHA256 server-side signature verification across UPI, cards, net banking, and COD — fraud-prevention validation confirmed to block tampered frontend responses.
  • →Built a paginated product catalog API with ~1 kB page payload, configurable sort by price/rating/date, category filtering, keyword search, and injection-safe field allowlisting across a 5-table MySQL schema.
  • →Developed a React 19 SPA with Redux Toolkit (3 slices: auth, cart, toast), 11 route-level pages, role-gated navigation, and localStorage persistence for JWT session and cart state surviving browser refresh.
  • →Configured Docker multi-stage build (Maven 3.9 + eclipse-temurin:17) and automated CI/CD via Railway and Vercel — every push to main deploys both backend and frontend within 2 minutes.

README 6 Pages · Full Stack Stripe · 3 Tiers
🎨
PortfolioHub
Full-Stack Portfolio Marketplace
  • →Delivered a production-deployed full-stack marketplace — end-to-end browse-to-purchase flow across 6 pages, 11 REST API routes, and 16 curated templates spanning 4 tech categories.
  • →Resolved a production CORS and DNS failure in a split-deployment architecture by building a Next.js server-side proxy routing all client requests to a Railway-hosted Express backend — eliminating ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED errors and removing the backend URL from the client bundle entirely.
  • →Integrated Stripe Checkout with signed webhook verification across 3 subscription tiers (Free / Pro / Agency) — purchase records written to PostgreSQL only after server-side event confirmation to prevent client-side payment spoofing.
  • →Secured 11 REST API endpoints with JWT-based auth and RBAC, enforcing USER and ADMIN permission boundaries via Express middleware across the full request lifecycle.
  • →Architected a PostgreSQL schema with 4 models (User, Portfolio, Purchase, Review) using Prisma ORM — seeded with 16 portfolio records and demo accounts via a single reproducible script.
  • →Built a Next.js 14 App Router frontend with a WebGL 3D animated hero using React Three Fiber and Three.js, achieving a 74 Lighthouse performance score across 6 fully responsive pages with a custom Tailwind CSS design system.

Research

Publication

📄 2025 · Peer-Reviewed Journal ✅ Accepted & Published Impact Factor: 5.2
CNN-Based Tomato Leaf Disease Detection With Smart Spraying Mechanism
Journal of Scientific Research and Technology (JSRT)  ·  ISSN: 2583-8660

This research presents an intelligent agricultural system that uses a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to automatically detect diseases in tomato plant leaves from image input, enabling early-stage identification that is often missed by the naked eye. The system is integrated with a smart spraying mechanism that precisely targets only the affected areas of the plant — minimising pesticide usage, reducing chemical waste, and lowering operational costs for farmers. The paper covers the CNN model architecture, training pipeline on labelled tomato leaf datasets, disease classification performance, and the IoT-based actuator design for the precision sprayer, demonstrating end-to-end automation from detection to treatment in a real-world agricultural setting.

Volume / Issue
Volume 3, Issue 7
Published
01 July 2025
DOI
10.61808/jsrt256
Indexed In
Crossref · Web of Science
